annotation: Cen Shen's most epic poem. The wind is so strong it moves boulders. The ink freezes in the tent. This is war at its most extreme — nature itself is the enemy.

title: 题破山寺后禅院
titlePinyin: Ti Po Shan Si Hou Chan Yuan
titleEn: The Back Garden of Broken Mountain Temple
author: 常建
content:
清晨入古寺
初日照高林
曲径通幽处
禅房花木深
山光悦鸟性
潭影空人心
万籁此都寂
但余钟磬音
translation:
Early morning, I enter the ancient temple
First sun shines on the tall forest
A winding path leads to a secluded place
The meditation room, flowers and trees deep
Mountain light delights the birds' nature
The pool's reflection empties the human heart
All sounds are silent here
Only the bell and chime remain
annotation: A winding path, deep flowers, birds singing, a still pool. Then — silence. Only a bell. Chang Jian captures the moment when nature and meditation become one.

title: 题都城南庄
titleEn: The Southern Village of the Capital
author: 崔护
content:
去年今日此门中
人面桃花相映红
人面不知何处去
桃花依旧笑春风
translation:
Last year today, in this gate
A face and peach blossoms reflected each other's red
The face — I don't know where it went
The peach blossoms still smile in the spring wind
annotation: A man returns to a girl he met last year. She's gone. Only the peach blossoms remain, smiling as if nothing happened. This is the pain of beautiful things that don't last.

title: 金缕衣
author: 杜秋娘
content:
劝君莫惜金缕衣
劝君惜取少年时
花开堪折直须折
莫待无花空折枝
translation:
I urge you: don't cherish the golden dress
I urge you: cherish your youth
When flowers bloom, pick them — you must
Don't wait until there are no flowers, and you're holding an empty branch
annotation: Carpe diem, Chinese style. The golden dress will fade, but youth is now. Pick the flower while it blooms. This is the most famous 'seize the day' poem in Chinese.

title: 宫词
author: 朱庆馀
content:
寂寂花时闭院门
美人相并立琼轩
含情欲说宫中事
鹦鹉前头不敢言
translation:
Quiet, quiet — flowering season, the courtyard gate closed
Beautiful women stand side by side by the jade railing
Full of feeling, they want to speak of palace matters
But before the parrot, they dare not speak
annotation: Even in a beautiful garden, the women can't speak freely. The parrot might repeat their words. A poem about surveillance and silence in the palace.

title: 近试上张水部
titlePinyin: Jin Shi Shang Zhang Shui Bu
titleEn: Before the Exam: To Secretary Zhang
author: 朱庆馀
content:
洞房昨夜停红烛
待晓堂前拜舅姑
妆罢低声问夫婿
画眉深浅入时无
translation:
Last night in the bridal chamber, red candles burned
At dawn, before the hall, I'll greet my in-laws
After makeup, I whisper to my husband
Is my eyebrow color fashionable?
annotation: A bride asks if her makeup is right. But Zhu Qingyu is really asking: will my exam paper please the judges? He uses marriage as a metaphor for the imperial examination.

title: 竹枝词
author: 刘禹锡
content:
杨柳青青江水平
闻郎江上踏歌声
东边日出西边雨
道是无晴却有晴
translation:
Willows green, the river calm
I hear my love singing on the boat
Sunrise in the east, rain in the west
You say there's no sunshine, yet there is
annotation: A clever love poem using a pun: 'sunshine' sounds like 'love.' 'You say there's no love, yet there is.' The weather becomes a flirtation.

title: 再游玄都观
author: 刘禹锡
content:
百亩庭中半是苔
桃花净尽菜花开
种桃道士归何处
前度刘郎今又来
translation:
In the hundred-acre courtyard, half is moss
The peach blossoms are all gone, only rapeseed flowers bloom
Where has the peach-planting Daoist gone?
The Liu who came before — today I'm back again
annotation: Liu Yuxi returns to a garden he visited years ago. The peach trees are gone, the Daoist is gone. But he's back. This is his middle finger to the officials who exiled him.

title: 西塞山怀古
titleEn: Mount Xisai: Thoughts on the Past
author: 刘禹锡
content:
王濬楼船下益州
金陵王气黯然收
千寻铁锁沉江底
一片降幡出石头
人世几回伤往事
山形依旧枕寒流
今逢四海为家日
故垒萧萧芦荻秋
translation:
Wang Jun's tower ships descend from Yi Zhou
Jinling's royal aura darkens and fades
A thousand fathoms of iron chain sink to the river bottom
One surrender banner rises from Stone City
How many times has the world grieved over the past?
The mountain's shape remains, pillowing the cold stream
Now, when the four seas are one home
The old fortress, desolate, reeds and rushes in autumn
annotation: An empire falls, iron chains sink, a banner rises. But the mountain remains. Liu Yuxi sees history's pattern: everything changes, the land stays.

title: 石头城
author: 刘禹锡
content:
山围故国周遭在
潮打空城寂寞回
淮水东边旧时月
夜深还过女墙来
translation:
Mountains surround the old kingdom, still all around
Waves hit the empty city, lonely, they return
The old moon east of the Huai River
Late at night, still passes over the parapet wall
annotation: The city is empty, the mountains remain. The moon that shone on the glorious past still rises. Liu Yuxi finds the moon to be the truest historian.

title: 乌衣巷
author: 刘禹锡
content:
朱雀桥边野草花
乌衣巷口夕阳斜
旧时王谢堂前燕
飞入寻常百姓家
translation:
By Rosefinch Bridge, wild grass and flowers
At Black Clothes Lane, the setting sun slants
The swallows that once nested in the halls of Wang and Xie
Now fly into the homes of ordinary people
annotation: Great families fell, their mansions crumbled. But the swallows still return — they just nest in common homes now. A poem about how time humbles everyone.

title: 望洞庭
author: 刘禹锡
content:
湖光秋月两相和
潭面无风镜未磨
遥望洞庭山水翠
白银盘里一青螺
translation:
Lake light and autumn moon harmonize
The pool's surface, no wind, a mirror unpolished
From afar, Dongting's mountains and water, emerald
A green snail in a silver plate
annotation: Dongting Lake at night: the moon and water become one. From above, the lake is a silver plate with a green island like a snail. Liu Yuxi's metaphor is unforgettable.

title: 浪淘沙
author: 刘禹锡
content:
九曲黄河万里沙
浪淘风簸自天涯
如今直上银河去
同到牵牛织女家
translation:
Nine bends of the Yellow River, ten thousand miles of sand
Waves wash, wind shakes, from the edge of the sky
Now I'll go straight up to the Milky Way
And visit the Cowherd and Weaver Girl together
annotation: The Yellow River's sand comes from the edge of the sky. Liu Yuxi imagines riding the waves all the way to heaven to meet the legendary lovers. Even dust can reach the stars.

title: 秋词
author: 刘禹锡
content:
自古逢秋悲寂寥
我言秋日胜春朝
晴空一鹤排云上
便引诗情到碧霄
translation:
Since ancient times, autumn brings sorrow and loneliness
I say autumn days surpass spring mornings
In the clear sky, a crane parts the clouds
And leads my poetic feelings to the blue heavens
annotation: Everyone says autumn is sad. Liu Yuxi disagrees. A crane soaring through clouds — autumn is more inspiring than spring! This is optimism as rebellion.

title: 酬乐天扬州初逢席上见赠
titlePinyin: Chou Le Tian Yang Zhou Chu Feng Xi Shang Jian Zeng
titleEn: Reply to Bai Juyi at Our First Meeting in Yangzhou
author: 刘禹锡
content:
巴山楚水凄凉地
二十三年弃置身
怀旧空吟闻笛赋
到乡翻似烂柯人
沉舟侧畔千帆过
病树前头万木春
今日听君歌一曲
暂凭杯酒长精神
translation:
The bleak lands of Ba and Chu
Twenty-three years, I was cast aside
Remembering the past, I vainly recite the flute poem
Returning home, I'm like the man with the rotten axe handle
A thousand sails pass by the sunken boat
Ten thousand trees bloom before the sick tree
Today I hear you sing one song
For now, I'll borrow wine to lift my spirit
annotation: After 23 years of exile, Liu Yuxi returns. 'A thousand sails pass the sunken boat' — the world moved on without him. But he's not bitter: 'Ten thousand trees bloom before the sick tree.' Life goes on.

title: 卖炭翁
author: 白居易
content:
卖炭翁
伐薪烧炭南山中
满面尘灰烟火色
两鬓苍苍十指黑
卖炭得钱何所营
身上衣裳口中食
可怜身上衣正单
心忧炭贱愿天寒
夜来城外一尺雪
晓驾炭车辗冰辙
牛困人饥日已高
市南门外泥中歇
翩翩两骑来是谁
黄衣使者白衫儿
手把文书口称敕
回车叱牛牵向北
一车炭
千余斤
宫使驱将惜不得
半匹红纱一丈绫
系向牛头充炭直
translation:
A charcoal seller
Cuts wood and burns charcoal in the Southern Mountain
Dust and smoke color his face
Temples gray, ten fingers black
What does he spend his charcoal money on?
Clothes for his body, food for his mouth
Pitiful — his clothes are thin
But he worries charcoal is cheap and wishes for cold weather
Last night, a foot of snow outside the wall
At dawn, he drives his charcoal cart over ice ruts
The cow is tired, the man hungry, the sun already high
He rests in the mud outside the south market gate
Two riders come flying — who are they?
Yellow-robed messenger, white-clad boy
Holding documents, mouth declaring imperial orders
They turn the cart, shout at the cow, pull it north
One cart of charcoal
Over a thousand pounds
The palace envoy drives it away — he can't stop them
Half a bolt of red silk, a length of gauze
Tied to the cow's head — the price of charcoal
annotation: An old man makes charcoal in the snow. The palace takes it all, paying with worthless silk. Bai Juyi's most direct protest poem — the system grinds down the poor.

title: 长相思
author: 白居易
content:
汴水流
泗水流
流到瓜洲古渡头
吴山点点愁
思悠悠
恨悠悠
恨到归时方始休
月明人倚楼
translation:
The Bian River flows
The Si River flows
Flowing to the ancient crossing at Guazhou
Wu's mountains, dot by dot, sorrow
Thinking, endless
Hating, endless
The hate only stops when you return
Bright moon, a person leans on the tower
annotation: Rivers flow toward the one she misses. Mountains look like dots of sorrow. The hate (of separation) only ends when he returns. Bai Juyi makes geography into emotion.

title: 离思
author: 元稹
content:
曾经沧海难为水
除却巫山不是云
取次花丛懒回顾
半缘修道半缘君
translation:
Having seen the vast sea, no water satisfies
Having seen Wu Mountain's clouds, no other clouds count
Passing through flower gardens, I'm too lazy to look back
Half because of my spiritual path, half because of you
annotation: After the greatest love, nothing else compares. 'Having seen the sea, no other water satisfies.' Yuan Zhen wrote this for his late wife. It's become the ultimate love declaration.

title: 行宫
author: 元稹
content:
寥落古行宫
宫花寂寞红
白头宫女在
闲坐说玄宗
translation:
Desolate, the ancient traveling palace
Palace flowers, lonely, red
White-haired palace women sit
Idly talking about Emperor Xuanzong
annotation: Four lines, an entire empire's story. The palace is empty, the flowers bloom for no one, old women gossip about the glorious past. Yuan Zhen captures the fall of an empire in 20 characters.

title: 游子吟
author: 孟郊
content:
慈母手中线
游子身上衣
临行密密缝
意恐迟迟归
谁言寸草心
报得三春晖
translation:
In a loving mother's hands, thread
On her traveling son's body, clothes
Before departure, she sews stitch by stitch
Fearing his return will be delayed
Who says the heart of grass
Can repay the spring sunshine?
annotation: A son's gratitude to his mother. The final metaphor is unforgettable: a tiny grass can never repay the warmth of the spring sun, just as children can never fully repay their parents' love.

title: 登科后
author: 孟郊
content:
昔日龌龊不足夸
今朝放荡思无涯
春风得意马蹄疾
一日看尽长安花
translation:
The past's frustrations aren't worth boasting about
Today, my thoughts roam without bounds
In spring wind, proud, my horse's hooves swift
In one day, I see all of Chang'an's flowers
annotation: After years of failure, Meng Jiao finally passes the exam at age 46. 'In one day, I see all of Chang'an's flowers.' This is what victory feels like after a lifetime of struggle.

title: 古怨别
author: 孟郊
content:
飒飒秋风生
愁人怨离别
含情两相向
欲语气先咽
心曲千万端
悲来却难说
别后唯所思
天涯共明月
translation:
Rustling, rustling, autumn wind rises
The sorrowful resent parting
Full of feeling, they face each other
About to speak, the voice chokes first
A heart's ten thousand curves
When sorrow comes, it's hard to speak
After parting, only thoughts of each other
At the edge of the sky, sharing the bright moon
annotation: They want to speak but can't. The words choke. After parting, only the moon connects them. Meng Jiao knows: the deepest feelings are the hardest to say.

title: 题李凝幽居
author: 贾岛
content:
闲居少邻并
草径入荒园
鸟宿池边树
僧敲月下门
过桥分野色
移石动云根
暂去还来此
幽期不负言
translation:
Leisurely dwelling, few neighbors
A grass path enters the wild garden
Birds sleep in the tree by the pool
A monk knocks on the gate under the moon
Crossing the bridge, the field's colors part
Moving stones, the cloud's roots shift
I'll leave for now but return
This secluded promise won't be broken
annotation: The famous 'knock' vs 'push' story. Jia Dao couldn't decide: should the monk knock or push? He met Han Yu on the street, who said 'knock' — more polite, more poetic. This is the origin of 'polishing' (推敲) in Chinese.

title: 剑客
author: 贾岛
content:
十年磨一剑
霜刃未曾试
今日把示君
谁有不平事
translation:
Ten years, I've sharpened one sword
Its frost blade has never been tested
Today I show it to you
Who has an injustice to right?
annotation: A swordsman who's spent ten years preparing. Today he's ready. 'Who has an injustice?' It's a job application — but with a sword. Jia Dao's ambition, sharpened to a point.

title: 不第后赋菊
titleEn: After Failing the Exam: Ode to Chrysanthemums
author: 黄巢
content:
待到秋来九月八
我花开后百花杀
冲天香阵透长安
满城尽带黄金甲
translation:
When autumn comes, the eighth of the ninth month
After my flowers bloom, all other flowers die
A fragrant array charges through Chang'an
The whole city wears golden armor
annotation: Failed the exam, so he wrote about chrysanthemums as revolution. 'The whole city wears golden armor' — this is a threat disguised as a flower poem. Huang Chao later led a massive rebellion.

title: 春怨
author: 金昌绪
content:
打起黄莺儿
莫教枝上啼
啼时惊妾梦
不得到辽西
translation:
Drive away the yellow oriole
Don't let it sing on the branch
Its singing startles my dream
And I can't reach Liaoxi
annotation: A woman shoos away a singing bird because it interrupts her dream of her husband at the frontier. The smallest annoyance becomes the greatest grief.

title: 哥舒歌
author: 西鄙人
content:
北斗七星高
哥舒带夜刀
至今窥牧马
不敢过临洮
translation:
The Big Dipper's seven stars high
Geshu carries his sword at night
To this day, watching their herding horses
They dare not cross Lintao
annotation: A folk song about General Geshu Han. Just his name and his sword keep the barbarians away. The people sing: as long as he's there, we're safe.

title: 陇西行
author: 陈陶
content:
誓扫匈奴不顾身
五千貂锦丧胡尘
可怜无定河边骨
犹是春闺梦里人
translation:
Sworn to sweep away the Xiongnu, regardless of life
Five thousand sable and brocade, lost in barbarian dust
Pitiful — the bones by the Wuding River
Are still the person in a spring chamber's dream
annotation: Five thousand soldiers died. Their bones are by the river. But their wives still dream of them coming home. The most devastating war poem — the dead are still alive in someone's dreams.

title: 春江花月夜
author: 张若虚
content:
春江潮水连海平
海上明月共潮生
滟滟随波千万里
何处春江无月明
江流宛转绕芳甸
月照花林皆似霰
空里流霜不觉飞
汀上白沙看不见
江天一色无纤尘
皎皎空中孤月轮
江畔何人初见月
江月何年初照人
人生代代无穷已
江月年年望相似
不知江月待何人
但见长江送流水
translation:
Spring river tide meets the sea, level
On the sea, the bright moon rises with the tide
Sparkling, following the waves, ten thousand miles
Where is the spring river without moonlight?
The river winds around fragrant meadows
The moon shines on flower forests like snow
In the sky, flowing frost, you don't feel it flying
On the islet, white sand, you can't see it
River and sky, one color, no dust
Bright, bright, the lone moon in the sky
By the river, who first saw the moon?
The river's moon — what year did it first shine on people?
Life after life, endless
The river moon, year after year, looks the same
I don't know who the river moon waits for
I only see the long river sending flowing water
annotation: The greatest moon poem in Chinese. Zhang Ruoxu asks: who first saw the moon? When did the moon first see us? The river flows, the moon stays, people come and go. It's philosophy dressed as a landscape painting.

title: 望月怀远
titleEn: Gazing at the Moon, Thinking of the Distant
author: 张九龄
content:
海上生明月
天涯共此时
情人怨遥夜
竟夕起相思
灭烛怜光满
披衣觉露滋
不堪盈手赠
还寝梦佳期
translation:
Over the sea, the bright moon rises
At the edge of the sky, we share this moment
Lovers resent the distant night
All night, longing arises
I extinguish the candle, loving the full light
Put on clothes, feel the dew forming
I can't hold it all in my hand to give you
I'll return to bed and dream of a good meeting
annotation: The moon rises over the sea. Far away, you see it too. Zhang Jiuling can't send the moon to his loved one, so he'll dream of them instead. The most tender moon poem.

title: 感遇
author: 张九龄
content:
兰叶春葳蕤
桂华秋皎洁
欣欣此生意
自尔为佳节
谁知林栖者
闻风坐相悦
草木有本心
何求美人折
translation:
Orchid leaves in spring, lush
Cassia flowers in autumn, bright and clean
Joyfully, this vitality
Makes its own beautiful season
Who knows the forest dweller
Hears the wind and sits in delight
Grass and trees have their own hearts
Why seek a beauty's picking?
annotation: Orchids bloom in spring, cassia in autumn — each in its season. They don't need anyone to pick them. Zhang Jiuling's message: be yourself, for yourself.

title: 下终南山过斛斯山人宿置酒
titlePinyin: Xia Zhong Nan Shan Guo Hu Si Shan Ren Su Zhi Jiu
titleEn: Descending Zhongnan Mountain, Staying with Hermit Hu Si
author: 李白
content:
暮从碧山下
山月随人归
却顾所来径
苍苍横翠微
相携及田家
童稚开荆扉
绿竹入幽涧
青萝拂行衣
欢言得所憩
美酒聊共挥
长歌吟松风
曲尽河星稀
我醉君复乐
陶然共忘机
translation:
At dusk I descend the green mountain
The mountain moon follows me home
Looking back at the path I came
Blue-green, crossing the emerald haze
We walk together to the farm
Children open the brush gate
Green bamboo enters the quiet ravine
Blue vines brush our traveling clothes
Happy talk, a good rest
Fine wine, we wave it freely
Long songs, singing with the pine wind
When the song ends, the river stars are thin
I'm drunk, you're happy
Together, we forget all schemes
annotation: Li Bai descends the mountain with the moon as his companion. A hermit's family welcomes him. Wine, songs, stars — and the best line: 'Together, we forget all schemes.' This is what friendship should be.

title: 子夜吴歌
author: 李白
content:
长安一片月
万户捣衣声
秋风吹不尽
总是玉关情
何日平胡虏
良人罢远征
translation:
Chang'an, one sheet of moonlight
Ten thousand households, the sound of pounding clothes
Autumn wind blows endlessly
Always, the feeling of the Jade Gate
When will we pacify the barbarians?
When will my husband stop his distant campaign?
annotation: Under the moon, ten thousand women pound clothes for soldiers at the frontier. The wind carries their worry. 'When will he come home?' — the question echoes across the city.

title: 山中问答
titleEn: Questions and Answers in the Mountains
author: 李白
content:
问余何意栖碧山
笑而不答心自闲
桃花流水窅然去
别有天地非人间
translation:
You ask why I dwell in the green mountains
I smile and don't answer — my heart is at ease
Peach blossoms and flowing water, deep and distant
Another heaven and earth, not the human world
annotation: Someone asks Li Bai why he lives in the mountains. He just smiles. How do you explain peace to someone who's never felt it? The peach blossoms know.

title: 玉阶怨
author: 李白
content:
玉阶生白露
夜久侵罗袜
却下水晶帘
玲珑望秋月
translation:
Jade steps grow white dew
Late night, it soaks her silk socks
She lowers the crystal curtain
Through the translucent screen, she gazes at the autumn moon
annotation: A palace woman waits all night. The dew soaks her socks. She lowers the curtain but still watches the moon. Li Bai never says 'lonely' — he shows it.

title: 金陵酒肆留别
titlePinyin: Jin Ling Jiu Si Liu Bie
titleEn: Farewell at a Jinling Wine Shop
author: 李白
content:
风吹柳花满店香
吴姬压酒唤客尝
金陵子弟来相送
欲行不行各尽觞
请君试问东流水
别意与之谁短长
translation:
Wind blows willow flowers, the shop is full of fragrance
A Wu girl presses wine, calls guests to taste
Jinling youths come to see me off
Wanting to go, not going, we finish our cups
I ask you: try comparing the eastward flowing water
With our parting feelings — which is shorter, which longer?
annotation: A farewell party in Nanjing. Everyone's drinking, no one wants to leave. Li Bai asks: is the river longer than our goodbye? Nothing is longer than parting.

title: 黄鹤楼
author: 崔颢
content:
昔人已乘黄鹤去
此地空余黄鹤楼
黄鹤一去不复返
白云千载空悠悠
晴川历历汉阳树
芳草萋萋鹦鹉洲
日暮乡关何处是
烟波江上使人愁
translation:
The ancient one already rode the yellow crane away
Here, only the Yellow Crane Tower remains
The yellow crane left and never returned
White clouds for a thousand years, empty, drifting
Clear river, distinct, the trees of Hanyang
Fragrant grass, thick, the Parrot Island
At dusk, where is the homeland?
Mist and waves on the river make one sorrowful
annotation: Li Bai said this poem was so good he couldn't match it. A man climbs a tower looking for a legend. The crane is gone, the clouds drift, the grass grows. Only homesickness remains.

title: 长干行
author: 崔颢
content:
君家何处住
妾住在横塘
停船暂借问
或恐是同乡
translation:
Where do you live?
I live by Hengtang
I stop my boat and ask briefly
Perhaps we're from the same hometown
annotation: A woman stops a stranger's boat: 'Where are you from? I'm from Hengtang — maybe we're neighbors!' The boldness of curiosity, the hope of connection.

title: 凉州词
author: 王之涣
content:
黄河远上白云间
一片孤城万仞山
羌笛何须怨杨柳
春风不度玉门关
translation:
The Yellow River rises far among white clouds
A lone city among mountains ten thousand feet
Why must the Qiang flute complain of willows?
Spring wind never passes Jade Gate Pass
annotation: At the edge of the empire, soldiers hear a flute and think of home. Beyond Jade Gate, even spring cannot reach. A poem about the loneliness of the frontier.

title: 闺怨
author: 王昌龄
content:
闺中少妇不知愁
春日凝妆上翠楼
忽见陌头杨柳色
悔教夫婿觅封侯
translation:
A young wife in her boudoir doesn't know sorrow
On a spring day, she dresses up and climbs the tower
Suddenly she sees the willow colors on the road
And regrets urging her husband to seek a noble title
annotation: She was so proud when her husband went to war for glory. Then she sees the spring willows and realizes: what good is a title if you're alone? The most honest regret.

title: 采莲曲
author: 王昌龄
content:
荷叶罗裙一色裁
芙蓉向脸两边开
乱入池中看不见
闻歌始觉有人来
translation:
Lotus leaves and silk skirts, cut from one color
Hibiscus opens on both sides of their faces
They mix into the pond, invisible
Only when you hear singing do you know someone's there
annotation: Girls picking lotus flowers blend into the pond. Their dresses are the same green as the leaves, their faces the same pink as the flowers. You only know they're there when they sing.

title: 十五夜望月
titleEn: Watching the Moon on the Fifteenth Night
author: 王建
content:
中庭地白树栖鸦
冷露无声湿桂花
今夜月明人尽望
不知秋思落谁家
translation:
In the courtyard, the ground is white, crows roost in trees
Cold dew, silent, dampens the osmanthus
Tonight the moon is bright, everyone looks
I know not whose home the autumn thoughts fall on
annotation: A full moon night. Everyone is looking up. But whose home does the longing land in? Wang Jian asks the question everyone feels but no one says.

title: 新嫁娘词
author: 王建
content:
三日入厨下
洗手作羹汤
未谙姑食性
先遣小姑尝
translation:
Three days after marriage, she enters the kitchen
Washes her hands and makes soup
Not yet knowing her mother-in-law's taste
She first has the sister-in-law taste it
annotation: A new bride navigates her new family. She doesn't know what her mother-in-law likes, so she tests it on the sister-in-law first. A tiny poem about the politics of fitting in.

title: 雨过山村
titleEn: After Rain in a Mountain Village
author: 王建
content:
雨里鸡鸣一两家
竹溪村路板桥斜
妇姑相唤浴蚕去
闲着中庭栀子花
translation:
In the rain, one or two households' roosters crow
Bamboo stream, village road, a slanting plank bridge
Women call each other to bathe the silkworms
Idle in the courtyard: gardenia flowers
annotation: After rain, a quiet village. Women call each other to work. The gardenia flowers are the only ones with nothing to do.王建 finds beauty in the ordinary.

title: 望夫石
author: 王建
content:
望夫处
江悠悠
化为石
不回头
translation:
Where she watches for her husband
The river flows endlessly
She turned to stone
And never looked back
annotation: A woman waited so long for her husband that she became a stone. Four lines, one legend.王建 tells an eternal story in the fewest possible words.

title: 节妇吟
author: 张籍
content:
君知妾有夫
赠妾双明珠
感君缠绵意
系在红罗襦
妾家高楼连苑起
良人执戟明光里
知君用心如日月
事夫誓拟同生死
还君明珠双泪垂
恨不相逢未嫁时
translation:
You know I have a husband
Yet you gave me a pair of bright pearls
Moved by your tender feelings
I tied them to my red silk jacket
My home's high tower connects to the palace garden
My husband carries a halberd in the Bright Light Hall
I know your heart is like the sun and moon
But I swore to live and die with my husband
I return your pearls with tears falling
I regret we didn't meet before I was married
annotation: A married woman receives a love gift. She's moved but returns it with tears. 'I regret we didn't meet before I was married.' The most graceful rejection in poetry.

title: 野老歌
author: 张籍
content:
老农家贫在山住
耕种山田三四亩
苗疏税多不得食
输入官仓化为土
岁暮锄犁傍空室
呼儿登山收橡实
西江贾客珠百斛
船中养犬长食肉
translation:
An old farmer, poor, lives in the mountains
Cultivates three or four acres of mountain fields
The seedlings are sparse, taxes are many, he can't eat
What's delivered to the government granary turns to dust
At year's end, hoe and plow lean against an empty room
He tells his son to climb the mountain and gather acorns
Merchants on the western river have pearls by the bushel
Dogs on their boats eat meat every day
annotation: A farmer works all year and eats acorns. Merchants' dogs eat meat. Zhang籍 doesn't comment — he just shows the contrast. The facts are the protest.

title: 秋思
author: 张籍
content:
洛阳城里见秋风
欲作家书意万重
复恐匆匆说不尽
行人临发又开封
translation:
In Luoyang city, I feel the autumn wind
I want to write a letter home, my thoughts weigh ten thousand pounds
Again I fear I've said everything too hastily
As the messenger is about to leave, I reopen the envelope
annotation: He writes a letter home. Seals it. Reopens it. What if he forgot something? This is the universal experience of trying to say everything in one letter.

title: 成都曲
author: 张籍
content:
锦江近西烟水绿
新雨山头荔枝熟
万里桥边多酒家
游人爱向谁家宿
translation:
Jin River, west side, misty water green
After fresh rain, mountain top, lychees ripen
By the Ten Thousand Li Bridge, many wine houses
Travelers — which house do you love to stay at?
annotation: Chengdu in summer: green river, ripe lychees, wine houses everywhere. Zhang籍 makes you want to visit. 'Which house do you love?' — he's asking the reader.

title: 夜到渔家
titleEn: Arriving at a Fisherman's Home at Night
author: 张籍
content:
渔家在江口
潮水入柴扉
行客欲投宿
主人犹未归
translation:
The fisherman's home is at the river mouth
Tide water enters the brush gate
A traveler wants to find shelter
The host still hasn't returned
annotation: A traveler arrives at a fisherman's hut. The tide is coming in, the door is open, but no one's home. Four lines, a whole story of waiting.

title: 雪诗
author: 张孜
content:
长安大雪天
鸟雀难相觅
其中豪贵家
捣椒泥四壁
到处爇红炉
周回下罗帏
暖手调金丝
蘸甲斟琼液
醉唱玉尘飞
困融香汗滴
translation:
Chang'an, a heavy snow day
Birds can barely find each other
In the homes of the rich
They grind pepper and plaster the walls
Everywhere, red stoves burn
Around them, silk curtains hang
Warm hands tune golden strings
Dipping fingers, they pour jade wine
Drunk, they sing of flying jade snow
Drowsy, melting, fragrant sweat drips
annotation: While the poor freeze, the rich grind pepper for their walls and drink warm wine. Zhang孜's satire: the snow is beautiful if you're inside.

title: 焚书坑
author: 章碣
content:
竹帛烟销帝业虚
关河空锁祖龙居
坑灰未冷山东乱
刘项原来不读书
translation:
Bamboo and silk burned to smoke, the empire's foundation hollow
Passes and rivers lock in vain the First Dragon's dwelling
The pit's ashes aren't yet cold — Shandong rebels
Liu and Yuan originally didn't read books
annotation: Qin Shi Huang burned books to control thought. But the rebels who overthrew him? They didn't read books either. Zhang Jie's irony: censorship never works.

title: 春闺思
author: 张仲素
content:
袅袅城边柳
青青陌上桑
提笼忘采叶
昨夜梦渔阳
translation:
Graceful, graceful, willows by the city wall
Green, green, mulberry on the road
She carries a basket but forgets to pick leaves
Last night she dreamed of Yuyang
annotation: A woman picks mulberry leaves but forgets what she's doing. She dreamed of her husband at the frontier. The willows and mulberry are just background to her longing.

title: 秋闺思
author: 张仲素
content:
碧窗斜月蔼深晖
愁听寒螀泪湿衣
梦里分明见关塞
不知何路向金微
translation:
Jade window, slanting moon, deep glow
Sorrowfully listening to cold crickets, tears wet my clothes
In the dream, I clearly see the passes and forts
But I don't know which road leads to Jinwei
annotation: She dreams of finding her husband at the frontier. But even in the dream, she can't find the way. The cruelest distance: when even dreams can't bridge it.

title: 塞下曲
author: 许浑
content:
夜战桑乾北
秦兵半不归
朝来有乡信
犹自寄寒衣
translation:
Night battle north of Sanggan
Half the Qin soldiers don't return
In the morning, a letter from home
Still sending winter clothes
annotation: Half the soldiers died last night. In the morning, a letter arrives with winter clothes. The clothes will never be worn. Xu Hun's most devastating poem — the delay of news is the cruelty.

title: 咸阳城东楼
author: 许浑
content:
一上高城万里愁
蒹葭杨柳似汀洲
溪云初起日沉阁
山雨欲来风满楼
鸟下绿芜秦苑夕
蝉鸣黄叶汉宫秋
行人莫问当年事
故国东来渭水流
translation:
Once I climb the high city wall, ten thousand miles of sorrow
Reeds and willows like Tingzhou
Stream clouds first rise, the sun sinks behind the pavilion
Mountain rain is about to come, wind fills the tower
Birds descend on green weeds, Qin garden at dusk
Cicadas sing in yellow leaves, Han palace in autumn
Travelers, don't ask about the past
The old kingdom — east comes the Wei River flowing
annotation: 'Mountain rain is about to come, wind fills the tower' — this line became a Chinese idiom for 'the calm before the storm.' Xu Hun sees history's weight in every cloud.

title: 金陵怀古
author: 许浑
content:
玉树歌残王气终
景阳兵合戍楼空
松楸远近千官冢
禾黍高低六代宫
石燕拂云晴亦雨
江豚吹浪夜还风
英雄一去豪华尽
惟有青山似洛中
translation:
The jade tree song ends, the royal aura fades
Jingyang soldiers gather, the watchtower empties
Pines and catalpas near and far, a thousand officials' tombs
Millet and sorghum high and low, six dynasties' palaces
Stone birds brush the clouds, rain even on clear days
River porpoises blow waves, wind even at night
Once the heroes leave, all luxury ends
Only the green mountains are like Luoyang
annotation: Six dynasties rose and fell in Nanjing. Now only tombs and weeds remain. Xu Hun's message: empires end, mountains stay.

title: 途经秦始皇墓
titlePinyin: Tu Jing Qin Shi Huang Mu
titleEn: Passing by Qin Shi Huang's Tomb
author: 许浑
content:
龙盘虎踞树层层
势入浮云亦是崩
一种青山秋草里
路人唯拜汉文陵
translation:
Dragon coiling, tiger crouching, layers of trees
Its momentum enters the clouds — yet it still collapsed
Among the same green mountains and autumn grass
Travelers only bow to Emperor Wen of Han's tomb
annotation: Qin Shi Huang's tomb is grand but forgotten. People bow to the humble tomb of Emperor Wen instead. Xu Hun's verdict: kindness outlasts power.

title: 马嵬坡
author: 郑畋
content:
玄宗回马杨妃死
云雨难忘日月新
终是圣明天子事
景阳宫井又何人
translation:
Xuanzong returned on horseback, Yang Guifei died
The old love was unforgettable, but the sun and moon renew
In the end, it was the act of a wise emperor
But what of the man in Jingyang's palace well?
annotation: Emperor Xuanzong had his beloved Yang Guifei killed to save his throne. Zheng Tian says it was 'wise' — but the sarcasm is sharp. How wise is it to kill the one you love?

title: 已凉
author: 韩偓
content:
碧阑干外绣帘垂
猩色屏风画折枝
八尺龙须方锦褥
已凉天气未寒时
translation:
Beyond the green railing, embroidered curtains hang
A vermillion screen painted with broken branches
Eight-foot dragon-beard mat, square brocade quilt
The weather is already cool but not yet cold
annotation: A room described in perfect detail — curtains, screen, mat, quilt. But the real subject is the feeling: that moment between cool and cold, between desire and restraint.

title: 春尽
author: 韩偓
content:
惜春连日醉昏昏
醒后衣裳见酒痕
细水浮花归别涧
断云含雨入孤村
人闲易有芳时恨
地迥难招自古魂
惭愧流莺相厚意
清晨犹为到西园
translation:
Cherishing spring, day after day drunk and dizzy
After waking, wine stains on my clothes
Tiny streams carry flowers to other ravines
Broken clouds hold rain entering a lonely village
When people are idle, it's easy to resent beautiful times
In remote places, it's hard to summon ancient souls
Grateful that the oriole is so kind
At dawn, it still comes to the western garden
annotation: Spring is ending, and he's been drinking to avoid feeling it. Flowers float away, clouds break apart. Only the oriole still visits. Han Wo's loneliness is almost physical.

title: 苏武庙
author: 温庭筠
content:
苏武魂销汉使前
古祠高树两茫然
雁断胡天月
羊归塞草烟
回日楼台非甲帐
去时冠剑是丁年
茂陵不见封侯印
空向秋波哭逝川
translation:
Su Wu's soul melted before the Han envoy
The ancient temple and tall trees, both lost in time
Geese cut off from the barbarian sky's moon
Sheep return to the frontier grass's smoke
When he returned, the towers were no longer his tent
When he left, he was a young man in his prime
At Maoling, no marquis seal was seen
In vain, facing autumn waves, he weeps for the passing river
annotation: Su Wu was held captive by the Xiongnu for 19 years. When he returned, everything had changed. Wen Tingyun asks: what's the point of loyalty when the world moves on without you?

title: 瑶瑟怨
author: 温庭筠
content:
冰簟银床梦不成
碧天如水夜云轻
雁声远过潇湘去
十二楼中月自明
translation:
On the silver bed with its ice mat, dreams won't come
Blue sky like water, night clouds light
The sound of geese passes far toward Xiao and Xiang
In the twelve towers, the moon shines by itself
annotation: She can't sleep. The sky is clear, geese fly south, the moon shines alone. Wen Tingyun paints loneliness with moonlight and distant bird calls.

title: 利州南渡
author: 温庭筠
content:
澹然空水对斜晖
曲岛苍茫接翠微
波上马嘶看棹去
柳边人歇待船归
数丛沙草群鸥散
万顷江田一鹭飞
谁解乘舟寻范蠡
五湖烟水独忘机
translation:
Calm, empty water faces the slanting sunlight
Winding islets, vast and hazy, meet the emerald haze
On the waves, a horse neighs, I watch the oar go
By the willows, people rest, waiting for the boat to return
Several clusters of sand grass, a flock of gulls scatters
Ten thousand acres of river fields, one egret flies
Who understands riding a boat to find Fan Li?
On the five lakes' misty water, alone forgetting all schemes
annotation: A river crossing at sunset. Gulls scatter, an egret flies. Wen Tingyun thinks of Fan Li, the wise man who left politics for a boat. 'Forgetting all schemes' — that's the dream.

title: 送人东游
author: 温庭筠
content:
荒戍落黄叶
浩然离故关
高风汉阳渡
初日郢门山
江上几人在
天涯孤棹还
何当重相见
樽酒慰离颜
translation:
Desolate fortress, yellow leaves fall
With resolve, he leaves the old pass
High wind at Hanyang crossing
First sun at Yingmen Mountain
How many remain by the river?
A lone oar returns from the edge of the sky
When will we meet again?
Wine to comfort our parting faces
annotation: Yellow leaves, high wind, a lone boat. Wen Tingyun sends a friend into the unknown. 'When will we meet again?' — the question that haunts every farewell.

title: 陇西行
author: 陈陶
content:
誓扫匈奴不顾身
五千貂锦丧胡尘
可怜无定河边骨
犹是春闺梦里人
translation:
Sworn to sweep away the Xiongnu, regardless of life
Five thousand sable and brocade, lost in barbarian dust
Pitiful — the bones by the Wuding River
Are still the person in a spring chamber's dream
annotation: Five thousand soldiers died. Their bones are by the river. But their wives still dream of them coming home. The most devastating war poem.

title: 将进酒
author: 李贺
content:
琉璃钟
琥珀浓
小槽酒滴真珠红
烹龙炮凤玉脂泣
罗帏绣幕围香风
吹龙笛
击鼍鼓
皓齿歌
细腰舞
况是青春日将暮
桃花乱落如红雨
劝君终日酩酊醉
酒不到刘伶坟上土
translation:
Crystal cup
Amber thick
From the small trough, wine drops like real pearls
Cooking phoenix, roasting dragon, jade fat weaves
Silk curtains and embroidered screens enclose fragrant wind
Blowing the dragon flute
Beating the alligator drum
White teeth singing
Slender waists dancing
Besides, youth's day is about to dusk
Peach blossoms fall chaotically like red rain
I urge you: be drunk all day
Wine won't reach Liu Ling's grave soil
annotation: Li He's wildest poem. Dragons, phoenixes, pearl wine, red rain of petals. 'Be drunk all day' — because death is the only sobering thing. Carpe diem with a gothic twist.

title: 李凭箜篌引
author: 李贺
content:
吴丝蜀桐张高秋
空山凝云颓不流
江娥啼竹素女愁
李凭中国弹箜篌
昆山玉碎凤凰叫
芙蓉泣露香兰笑
十二门前融冷光
二十三丝动紫皇
女娲炼石补天处
石破天惊逗秋雨
梦入神山教神妪
老鱼跳波瘦蛟舞
吴质不眠倚桂树
露脚斜飞湿寒兔
translation:
Wu silk, Shu paulownia, stretched in high autumn
Empty mountain, clouds congealed, not flowing
River goddess cries on bamboo, plain girl grieves
Li Ping in China plays the harp
Kunshan jade shatters, phoenix cries
Lotus weeps dew, orchid laughs
Before the twelve gates, cold light melts
Twenty-three strings move the purple emperor
Where Nüwa smelted stones to mend the sky
Stones break, sky startles, teasing autumn rain
In dreams, entering sacred mountains, teaching divine old women
Old fish leap in waves, thin dragons dance
Wu Zhi doesn't sleep, leaning on the cassia tree
Dew feet slant flying, wetting the cold rabbit
annotation: Li He's most fantastical poem. Music so powerful it breaks the sky, makes fish dance, keeps the moon god awake. This is what happens when a poet hears music and sees the universe.

title: 金铜仙人辞汉歌
titlePinyin: Jin Tong Xian Ren Ci Han Ge
titleEn: The Bronze Immortal's Farewell to Han
author: 李贺
content:
魏明帝诏牵车
指千里东关
酸风射眸子
忆君清泪如铅水
衰兰送客咸阳道
天若有情天亦老
携盘独出月荒凉
渭城已远波声小
translation:
Emperor Ming of Wei orders the cart pulled
Pointing a thousand miles to the eastern pass
Sour wind shoots into the eyes
Remembering you, clear tears like lead water
Wilted orchids see the guest off on the Xianyang road
If heaven had feelings, heaven would also grow old
Carrying the plate alone, the moon is desolate
Wei City is far now, the wave sounds small
annotation: A bronze statue is moved from its palace. It weeps lead tears. 'If heaven had feelings, heaven would grow old' — Li He's most famous line. Even the sky would age from grief.

title: 雁门太守行
titleEn: Song of the Governor of Yanmen
author: 李贺
content:
黑云压城城欲摧
甲光向日金鳞开
角声满天秋色里
塞上燕脂凝夜紫
半卷红旗临易水
霜重鼓寒声不起
报君黄金台上意
提携玉龙为君死
translation:
Black clouds press the city, the city about to crumble
Armor light faces the sun, golden scales open
Horn sounds fill the sky in autumn colors
On the frontier, rouge congeals into night's purple
Half-rolled red banner approaches the Yi River
Frost heavy, drum cold, the sound won't rise
To repay the Golden Tower's intention
I'll carry the jade sword and die for you
annotation: The most colorful war poem. Black clouds, golden armor, purple night, red banners. Li He paints battle like a fever dream. The final line: 'I'll die for you' — loyalty unto death.

title: 梦天
author: 李贺
content:
老兔寒蟾泣天色
云楼半开壁斜白
玉轮轧露湿团光
鸾珮相逢桂香陌
黄尘清水三山下
更变千年如走马
遥望齐州九点烟
一泓海水杯中泻
translation:
Old rabbit, cold toad, weeping the sky's color
Cloud towers half-open, walls slanting white
Jade wheel rolls over dew, wetting clustered light
Phoenix pendants meet on the cassia-scented path
Yellow dust and clear water beneath the three mountains
A thousand years change like a running horse
From afar, the nine states are nine dots of smoke
A cup of sea water poured from a cup
annotation: Li He dreams of heaven. The moon is a palace, the earth is nine dots of smoke, the ocean is a cup of water. From above, everything small becomes nothing. This is cosmic perspective.

title: 南园
author: 李贺
content:
男儿何不带吴钩
收取关山五十州
请君暂上凌烟阁
若个书生万户侯
translation:
Why doesn't a man carry a Wu hook
And reclaim the fifty provinces of passes and mountains?
I ask you: go briefly to the Lingyan Pavilion
How many scholars became marquises of ten thousand households?
annotation: Li He is frustrated. Why study when soldiers get all the glory? 'How many scholars became marquises?' — the question that every bookish person has asked.

title: 致酒行
author: 李贺
content:
零落栖迟一杯酒
主人奉觞客长寿
主父西游困不归
家人折断门前柳
吾闻马周昔作新丰客
天荒地老无人识
空将笺上两行书
直犯龙颜请恩泽
我有迷魂招不得
雄鸡一声天下白
少年心事当拏云
谁念幽寒坐呜呃
translation:
Wandering, stranded, one cup of wine
The host offers a cup, the guest wishes longevity
The master's son went west and was trapped, didn't return
His family broke the willows by the gate
I heard Ma Zhou was once a guest in Xinfeng
Heaven old, earth withered, no one knew him
With just two lines on paper
He directly approached the dragon face and asked for grace
I have a lost soul that can't be summoned
Until a rooster crows and the world turns white
A young man's heart should grasp the clouds
Who pities the cold, sitting and whimpering?
annotation: Li He is broke and forgotten. But then — a rooster crows, the world turns white. 'A young man's heart should grasp the clouds.' Even in despair, he won't stop reaching.

title: 宫词
author: 薛涛
content:
花开不同赏
花落不同悲
欲问相思处
花开花落时
translation:
When flowers bloom, we don't admire them together
When flowers fall, we don't grieve together
If you ask when I miss you
It's when flowers bloom and when they fall
annotation: A woman's longing in four lines. Every season reminds her of who's missing. Xue Tao was one of the most famous female poets of the Tang.

title: 送友人
author: 薛涛
content:
水国蒹葭夜有霜
月寒山色共苍苍
谁言千里自今夕
离梦杳如关塞长
translation:
Water country, reeds, night has frost
Moon cold, mountain colors, all blue-green
Who says a thousand miles starts tonight?
The parting dream is as long as the frontier passes
annotation: Frost, cold moon, blue mountains. The dream of parting stretches as far as the frontier. Xue Tao makes distance feel infinite.

title: 筹笔驿
author: 李商隐
content:
猿鸟犹疑畏简书
风云常为护储胥
徒令上将挥神笔
终见降王走传车
管乐有才真不忝
关张无命欲何如
他年锦里经祠庙
梁父吟成恨有余
translation:
Monkeys and birds still fear his written orders
Wind and clouds always protected his camp
In vain did the great general wield his divine brush
In the end, the conquered king rode the prison cart
Guan Zhong and Yue Yi had talent — truly not inferior
But Guan Yu and Zhang Fei had no fate — what could be done?
In later years, passing the temple in Jinli
The Liangfu Song finished, regret remains
annotation: Zhuge Liang was brilliant but couldn't save his kingdom. Li Shangyin asks: what good is talent without luck? 'Regret remains' — the word that defines Li Shangyin's poetry.

title: 马嵬
author: 李商隐
content:
海外徒闻更九州
他生未卜此生休
空闻虎旅传宵柝
无复鸡人报晓筹
此日六军同驻马
当时七夕笑牵牛
如何四纪为天子
不及卢家有莫愁
translation:
From beyond the sea, one hears of nine more continents
Next life is uncertain, this life is over
In vain, the tiger guard passes the night watch
No more the rooster man announces the dawn
Today, the six armies all halt their horses
That time, on Qixi, they laughed at the Cowherd
How can forty years as emperor
Be worse than the Lu family having a wife named Mo Chou?
annotation: Emperor Xuanzong had everything — empire, love, power. But he lost his wife and his throne. Li Shangyin's devastating question: how is being emperor worse than being a common man with a loving wife?

title: 隋宫
author: 李商隐
content:
乘兴南游不戒严
九重谁省谏书函
春风举国裁宫锦
半作障泥半作帆
translation:
In high spirits, he tours the south without caution
Who in the palace reads the warning letters?
In spring wind, the whole country cuts palace brocade
Half for mud guards, half for sails
annotation: The Sui emperor's extravagance: the whole country cuts silk just for his boats. Half for mud guards, half for sails. Luxury built on the people's exhaustion.

title: 二月二日
titleEn: The Second Day of the Second Month
author: 李商隐
content:
二月二日江上行
东风日暖闻吹笙
花须柳眼各无赖
紫蝶黄蜂俱有情
万里忆归元亮井
三年从事亚夫营
新滩莫悟游人意
更作风檐夜雨声
translation:
On the second day of the second month, I walk by the river
East wind, warm sun, I hear flute playing
Flowers' stamens and willow eyes — all unruly
Purple butterflies and yellow wasps — all full of feeling
Ten thousand miles, I remember returning to Yuan Liang's well
Three years, serving in Ya Fu's camp
The new shoal doesn't understand the traveler's heart
And makes the sound of wind and rain on the eaves at night
annotation: Spring is beautiful but he's far from home. The flowers don't care, the butterflies don't care. Only he feels the loneliness. Even the river sounds like rain on a lonely night.

title: 筹笔驿
author: 罗隐
content:
抛掷南阳为主忧
北征东讨尽良筹
时来天地皆同力
运去英雄不自由
千里山河轻孺子
两朝冠剑恨谯周
唯余岩下多情水
犹解年年傍驿流
translation:
He left Nanyang, worrying for his lord
Northern campaigns, eastern attacks — all good strategy
When fortune comes, heaven and earth join forces
When luck leaves, even heroes aren't free
A thousand miles of rivers and mountains, light for the child
Two dynasties' robes and swords, hate for Qiao Zhou
Only the多情 water beneath the rocks
Still understands, flowing by the station year after year
annotation: Zhuge Liang did everything right but still failed. Luo Yin's verdict: 'When luck leaves, even heroes aren't free.' Sometimes it's not about talent — it's about timing.

title: 蜂
author: 罗隐
content:
不论平地与山尖
无限风光尽被占
采得百花成蜜后
为谁辛苦为谁甜
translation:
Whether flat land or mountain peak
All the beautiful scenery is occupied
After gathering a hundred flowers to make honey
For whom is the toil? For whom is the sweetness?
annotation: Bees work for others. Luo Yin asks: who benefits from your labor? This is a poem about workers, about artists, about anyone who creates for someone else's enjoyment.

title: 雪
author: 罗隐
content:
尽道丰年瑞
丰年事若何
长安有贫者
为瑞不宜多
translation:
Everyone says snow is a good omen for a bumper year
But what about a bumper year's reality?
In Chang'an there are poor people
For them, too much 'good omen' is not good
annotation: Snow is beautiful — if you're warm. Luo Yin reminds us: the poor freeze while the rich admire the 'good omen.' His most direct social criticism.

title: 自遣
author: 罗隐
content:
得即高歌失即休
多愁多恨亦悠悠
今朝有酒今朝醉
明日愁来明日愁
translation:
When you win, sing loudly; when you lose, let it go
Too much sorrow and hate — also fleeting
Today there's wine, today get drunk
Tomorrow's worries — worry about them tomorrow
annotation: Failed the exam ten times. Luo Yin's response: 'Today there's wine, today get drunk.' It's not giving up — it's surviving. Sometimes the bravest thing is to laugh.

title: 西施
author: 罗隐
content:
家国兴亡自有时
吴人何苦怨西施
西施若解倾吴国
越国亡来又是谁
translation:
The rise and fall of kingdoms has its own timing
Why do the people of Wu blame Xi Shi?
If Xi Shi could topple the Kingdom of Wu
Then who destroyed the Kingdom of Yue?
annotation: Everyone blames Xi Shi for Wu's fall. Luo Yin asks: if she was so powerful, why did Yue fall too? Don't blame women for men's failures.

title: 题菊花
author: 黄巢
content:
飒飒西风满院栽
蕊寒香冷蝶难来
他年我若为青帝
报与桃花一处开
translation:
Rustling, rustling, west wind, planted all through the courtyard
Petals cold, fragrance cold, butterflies hardly come
If someday I become the Green Emperor
I'll let them bloom together with the peach blossoms
annotation: Chrysanthemums bloom in cold autumn when no one appreciates them. Huang Chao's fantasy: if I were god, I'd let them bloom in spring with the peach blossoms. It's a revolution against the natural order.

title: 台城
author: 韦庄
content:
江雨霏霏江草齐
六朝如梦鸟空啼
无情最是台城柳
依旧烟笼十里堤
translation:
River rain, dense and fine, river grass even
The six dynasties like a dream, birds sing in vain
The most heartless are the willows of the Terrace City
Still mist-shrouding the ten-mile embankment
annotation: Six dynasties rose and fell. The willows don't care — they just keep growing. Wei庄's most famous line: nature's indifference to human history.

title: 金陵图
author: 韦庄
content:
谁谓伤心画不成
画人心逐世人情
君看六幅南朝事
老木寒云满故城
translation:
Who says sorrow can't be painted?
The painter's heart follows the world's mood
Look at the six panels of the Southern Dynasties
Old trees, cold clouds, filling the old city
annotation: Can you paint sadness? Wei庄 says yes: old trees, cold clouds, a ruined city. The painting is the sorrow.

title: 送日本国僧敬龙归
titlePinyin: Song Ri Ben Guo Seng Jing Long Gui
titleEn: Seeing Off Monk Jinglong to Japan
author: 韦庄
content:
扶桑已在渺茫中
家在扶桑东更东
此去与师谁共到
一船明月一帆风
translation:
Fusang is already in the distance
Home is even further east of Fusang
On this journey, who accompanies the master?
One boat of moonlight, one sail of wind
annotation: A Japanese monk goes home — further east than east. Only moonlight and wind will accompany him. Wei庄 makes the journey feel both vast and intimate.

title: 秦妇吟
author: 韦庄
content:
中和癸卯春三月
洛阳城外花如雪
东西南北路人绝
绿杨悄悄香尘灭
路旁忽见如花人
独向绿杨阴下歇
凤侧鸾欹鬓脚斜
红攒黛敛眉心折
借问女郎何处来
含颦欲语声先咽
translation:
Third month of spring, the year of Guimao
Outside Luoyang, flowers like snow
East, west, north, south — no travelers on the road
Green willows silent, fragrant dust extinguished
By the road, suddenly a flower-like person
Alone resting beneath the green willow's shade
Phoenix tilted, phoenix slanted, temples askew
Red gathered, brows knotted, heart broken
I ask: where do you come from?
Frowning, about to speak, voice chokes first
annotation: The longest narrative poem in Tang literature. A woman tells her story of surviving the Huang Chao rebellion. Wei庄 gives voice to the voiceless.

title: 古离别
author: 韦庄
content:
晴烟漠漠柳毵毵
不那离情酒半酣
更把玉鞭云外指
断肠春色在江南
translation:
Clear mist, vast and fine, willows drooping
Can't bear the parting feelings, wine half-finished
He points his jade whip beyond the clouds
Heartbreaking spring colors are in Jiangnan
annotation: Mist, willows, half-finished wine. He points south: the most beautiful spring is where you're going without me. The cruelest farewell: sending someone to paradise alone.

title: 忆昔
author: 韦庄
content:
昔年曾向五陵游
子夜歌清月满楼
银烛树前长似昼
露桃花里不知秋
西园公子名无忌
南国佳人号莫愁
今日乱离俱是梦
夕阳唯见水东流
translation:
In years past, I wandered the Five Tombs
Midnight songs clear, moon filling the tower
Silver candle trees, always like day
Dew peach blossoms, not knowing autumn
The western garden prince was called Wu Ji
The southern kingdom beauty was called Mo Chou
Today, chaos and separation are all dreams
Only the setting sun sees the water flowing east
annotation: The good old days: music, wine, beautiful people. Now it's all a dream. Only the river still flows. Wei庄's nostalgia is for an entire era.

title: 菩萨蛮
author: 韦庄
content:
人人尽说江南好
游人只合江南老
春水碧于天
画船听雨眠
垆边人似月
皓腕凝霜雪
未老莫还乡
还乡须断肠
translation:
Everyone says Jiangnan is beautiful
Travelers should grow old in Jiangnan
Spring water bluer than the sky
In a painted boat, listening to rain, sleeping
By the wine jar, a person like the moon
White wrists like congealed frost and snow
Don't return home while still young
Returning home would break your heart
annotation: Jiangnan is so beautiful you should never leave. But that's exactly why you can't go home — home would hurt too much after this. Wei庄's most bittersweet poem.

title: 女冠子
author: 韦庄
content:
四月十七
正是去年今日
别君时
忍泪佯低面
含羞半敛眉
不知魂已断
空有梦相随
除却天边月
没人知
translation:
The seventeenth of fourth month
Exactly a year ago today
When I left you
Holding back tears, pretending to lower my face
Bashful, half-knitting my brows
I didn't know my soul was already broken
Only dreams follow in vain
Except for the moon at the edge of the sky
No one knows
annotation: A year since they parted. She still dreams of him. Only the moon knows. Wei庄 writes a woman's heart with devastating simplicity.

title: 浣溪沙
author: 韦庄
content:
夜夜相思更漏残
伤心明月凭阑干
想君思我锦衾寒
咫尺画堂深似海
忆来惟把旧书看
几时携手入长安
translation:
Night after night, longing, the water clock runs out
Heartbroken, bright moon, leaning on the railing
Thinking of you, missing me, the brocade quilt is cold
The painted hall, so close, deep as the sea
Remembering, I only read old letters
When will we walk hand in hand into Chang'an?
annotation: She reads old letters. The moon is bright, the quilt is cold. 'When will we walk together?' — the question that has no answer.

title: 应天长
author: 韦庄
content:
绿槐阴里黄莺语
深院无人春昼午
画帘垂
金凤舞
寂寞绣屏香一炷
碧天云无定处
空有梦魂来去
夜夜绿窗风雨
断肠君信否
translation:
Green locust trees' shade, yellow orioles sing
Deep courtyard, no one, spring day at noon
Painted curtains hang
Golden phoenixes dance
Lonely embroidered screen, one stick of incense
Blue sky clouds, no fixed place
Only dream souls come and go
Night after night, green window, wind and rain
Heartbroken — do you believe it?
annotation: A woman alone in a deep courtyard. Birds sing, curtains hang, incense burns. 'Heartbroken — do you believe it?' She's asking if he knows how much she suffers.

title: 荷叶杯
author: 韦庄
content:
绝代佳人难得
倾国
花下见无期
一双愁黛远山眉
不忍更思伊
闲掩翠屏金凤
残梦
罗幕画堂空
碧天无路信难通
惆怅旧房栊
translation:
A peerless beauty, hard to find
City-toppling, kingdom-toppling
Under the flowers, no meeting in sight
A pair of sorrowful brows like distant mountains
I can't bear to think of her more
Idly closing the golden phoenix screen
Broken dream
Silk curtains, painted hall, empty
Blue sky, no road, letters hard to send
Melancholy, the old room
annotation: A beauty he can't reach. The screen is closed, the hall is empty, the sky has no road.韦庄 writes longing as physical distance.

title: 清平乐
author: 韦庄
content:
春愁南陌
故国音书隔
细雨霏霏梨花白
燕拂画帘金额
尽日相望王孙
尘满衣上泪痕
谁向桥边吹笛
驻马西望销魂
translation:
Spring sorrow on the southern road
Homeland letters cut off
Fine rain, dense and fine, pear blossoms white
Swallows brush the painted curtain, gold trim
All day watching for the nobleman
Dust covers clothes, tear stains
Who plays the flute by the bridge?
Halted horse, looking west, soul destroyed
annotation: Spring, rain, pear blossoms — and no letters from home. Someone plays a flute by the bridge. The traveler stops his horse and looks west, toward everything he's lost.

title: 谒金门
author: 韦庄
content:
春雨足
染就一溪新绿
柳外飞来双羽玉
弄晴相对浴
楼外翠帘高轴
倚遍阑干几曲
云淡水平烟树簇
寸心千里目
translation:
Spring rain enough
Dyeing the whole stream new green
Beyond the willows, a pair of jade feathers fly
Playing in the clear sky, bathing opposite each other
Beyond the tower, green curtains high-rolled
Leaning on every curve of the railing
Clouds light, water level, misty trees clustered
An inch of heart, a thousand-mile gaze
annotation: Spring rain turns the stream green. Two birds bathe in the sunlight. She leans on the railing, looking as far as her heart can reach — a thousand miles, but only an inch of heart.

title: 天仙子
author: 韦庄
content:
深夜归来长酩酊
扶入流苏犹未醒
醺醺酒气麝兰和
惊睡觉
笑呵呵
长道人生能几何
translation:
Late at night he returns, completely drunk
Supported into the silk hangings, still not sober
Wine fumes mixed with musk and orchid
Startled awake
Laughing ha-ha
He keeps saying: how long can a person live?
annotation: A drunk man stumbles home, still laughing. 'How long can a person live?' — the question that justifies every drink.韦庄 captures the philosophy of the bottle.

title: 酒泉子
author: 韦庄
content:
月落星沉
楼上美人春睡稳
绿云倾
金枕腻
画屏深
translation:
Moon sets, stars sink
Upstairs, the beauty sleeps soundly in spring
Green clouds (hair) tilted
Golden pillow, smooth
Painted screen, deep
annotation: Moon sets, stars fade, a woman sleeps. Her hair spills across the pillow. The screen is deep.韦庄 paints a sleeping beauty with the lightest touch.

title: 定西番
author: 韦庄
content:
芳草丛生结缕
花艳艳
雨蒙蒙
晓来思绕天涯
南浦魂销
芳草年年有恨
绿遍江南
translation:
Fragrant grass grows in clusters, tying threads
Flowers bright, bright
Rain misty, misty
At dawn, thoughts wind to the edge of the sky
At the southern shore, the soul melts
Fragrant grass, year after year, has resentment
Green covers all Jiangnan
annotation: Bright flowers, misty rain, grass everywhere. But the grass has resentment — it grows every year, and so does her longing.

title: 诉衷情
author: 韦庄
content:
碧沼红芳烟雨静
倚兰桡
垂玉带
交带
动莺语
迎佳期
出兰闺
向柳陌
过花溪
入翠帏
醉且追
又相随
解罗衣
屏帐掩
绣帘垂
低唱笑
含娇姿
translation:
Green pond, red flowers, rain mist quiet
Leaning on the orchid oar
Hanging jade belt
Crossing belts
Moving orioles' words
Welting a good meeting
Emerging from the orchid chamber
Toward the willow path
Crossing the flower stream
Entering the green curtains
Drunk and pursuing
Following again
Untying silk clothes
Screen curtains closing
Embroidered curtains hanging
Low singing, laughing
Containing a charming posture
annotation: A secret meeting by a green pond. Flowers, rain, orchid oars. They meet, they drink, they laugh.韦庄 writes desire with the lightest possible touch.

title: 思帝乡
author: 韦庄
content:
春日游
杏花吹满头
陌上谁家年少
足风流
妾拟将身嫁与
一生休
纵被无情弃
不能羞
translation:
Spring day outing
Peach blossoms blow all over my head
On the road, whose young man
So charming
I plan to marry him
For the rest of my life
Even if he heartlessly abandons me
I won't be ashamed
annotation: A woman sees a charming young man and decides: I'll marry him, even if he leaves me. This is love without conditions — reckless, brave, and completely honest.

title: 上行杯
author: 韦庄
content:
芳草灞陵春岸
柳烟深
满楼弦管
离人辞旧苑
驻马西望肠断
translation:
Fragrant grass, Ba Ling's spring shore
Willow mist deep
The whole tower, strings and pipes
The parting person leaves the old garden
Halts his horse, looks west, heartbroken
annotation: Music plays, willows sway, and someone leaves. He looks west one last time. The shortest farewell can be the most painful.

title: 女冠子
author: 韦庄
content:
昨夜夜半
枕上分明梦见
语多时
依旧桃花面
频低柳叶眉
半羞还半喜
欲去又依依
觉来知是梦
不胜悲
translation:
Last night at midnight
On the pillow, I clearly dreamed
We talked for a long time
Still the same peach-blossom face
Frequently lowering willow-leaf brows
Half bashful, still half happy
About to leave, still reluctant
Waking, I know it was a dream
Can't bear the sorrow
annotation: She dreamed of him. His face, his brows, his voice. Half happy, half shy. Then she woke up. 'Can't bear the sorrow' — the cruelest thing about dreams is waking.

title: 更漏子
author: 温庭筠
content:
玉炉香
红蜡泪
照画堂秋思
眉翠薄
鬓云残
夜长衾枕寒
梧桐树
三更雨
不道离情正苦
一叶叶
一声声
空阶滴到明
translation:
Jade stove incense
Red candle tears
Illuminating the painted hall's autumn thoughts
Eyebrow color thin
Temple clouds broken
Night long, quilt and pillow cold
Phoenix tree
Third watch rain
Not caring that parting feelings are bitter
Leaf by leaf
Drop by drop
On the empty steps, dripping until dawn
annotation: Candles drip, rain falls, the night never ends. 'Dripping until dawn' — the sound of loneliness measured in water drops.温庭筠 is the master of sensory sorrow.

title: 菩萨蛮
author: 温庭筠
content:
小山重叠金明灭
鬓云欲度香腮雪
懒起画蛾眉
弄妆梳洗迟
照花前后镜
花面交相映
新帖绣罗襦
双双金鹧鸪
translation:
Small mountains overlap, gold light flickers
Temple clouds about to cross snowy cheeks
Lazily rising to paint moth eyebrows
Playing with makeup, washing slowly
Mirrors front and back reflect the flowers
Flower face and mirror reflect each other
Newly embroidered silk jacket
Pairs of golden partridges
annotation: A woman wakes slowly, puts on makeup, looks in mirrors. Everything is beautiful — her face, her jacket, the paired birds. But 'pairs' reminds her: she's alone.

title: 南歌子
author: 温庭筠
content:
手里金鹦鹉
胸前绣凤凰
偷眼暗形相
不如从嫁与
作鸳鸯
translation:
In her hand, a golden parrot
On her chest, an embroidered phoenix
She secretly sizes him up
Better to marry him
And become a mandarin duck pair
annotation: A woman sees a man and thinks: I should marry him. 'Mandarin duck pair' — the Chinese symbol of lovebirds.温庭筠 writes female desire with refreshing directness.

title: 梦江南
author: 温庭筠
content:
千万恨
恨极在天涯
山月不知心里事
水风空落眼前花
摇曳碧云斜
translation:
Ten thousand hates
The hate reaches its limit at the edge of the sky
The mountain moon doesn't know the heart's affairs
The water wind idly drops flowers before my eyes
Swaying, the blue clouds slant
annotation: She hates that he's so far away. The moon doesn't care, the wind just blows flowers around. Everything is beautiful except her heart.

title: 河传
author: 温庭筠
content:
湖上
闲望
雨萧萧
烟浦花桥路遥
谢娘翠蛾愁不销
终朝
梦魂迷晚潮
translation:
On the lake
Idly gazing
Rain, rustling
Mist shore, flower bridge, the road far
Lady Xie's green brows, sorrow never fades
All day
Dream soul lost in the evening tide
annotation: Rain on a lake, a distant bridge, a woman's sorrow that never fades. Her dream soul is lost in the tide — she can't find her way back.

title: 酒泉子
author: 温庭筠
content:
花映柳条
闲向绿萍池上
凭阑干
窥细浪
近来音信两疏索
洞房空寂寞
掩银屏
垂翠箔
度春宵
translation:
Flowers reflect willow branches
Idly facing the green duckweed pool
Leaning on the railing
Peeking at the fine waves
Recently, letters have been sparse and few
The bridal chamber, empty and lonely
Closing the silver screen
Hanging the green foil
Passing the spring night
annotation: Flowers, willows, a pool, a railing. But no letters. The bridal chamber is empty. She passes the spring night alone, counting the hours.

title: 定西番
author: 温庭筠
content:
汉使昔年离别
攀弱柳
折寒梅
上高台
千里玉关春雪
雁来人不来
translation:
The Han envoy parted in years past
Climbing the weak willow
Breaking the cold plum blossom
Ascending the high tower
A thousand miles, Jade Gate's spring snow
The geese come, but the person doesn't come
annotation: She breaks a plum blossom, climbs a tower, looks west. The geese return every spring. He doesn't. The most painful waiting is when nature keeps its promises but people don't.

title: 诉衷情
author: 温庭筠
content:
莺语
花舞
春昼午
雨霏霏
金带枕
宫锦
凤凰帷
柳弱蝶交飞
依依
辽阳音信稀
梦中归
translation:
Orioles sing
Flowers dance
Spring day at noon
Rain, dense and fine
Golden belt pillow
Palace brocade
Phoenix curtains
Willow weak, butterflies cross-flying
Reluctant
Liaoyang letters, rare
In dreams, I return
annotation: Spring is everywhere — singing birds, dancing flowers, butterflies. But his letters are rare. Only in dreams can she go to him.

title: 归国遥
author: 韦庄
content:
春欲暮
满地落花红带雨
惆怅玉笼鹦鹉
单栖无伴侣
南望去程何许
问花花不语
早晚得同归去
恨无双翠羽
translation:
Spring about to end
Ground full of falling flowers, red with rain
Melancholy, a jade-caged parrot
Alone, no companion
Southward I gaze — how far the journey?
I ask the flowers; they don't speak
Sooner or later we'll return together
I hate not having a pair of green wings
annotation: Flowers fall in the rain. A caged parrot has no companion. She asks the flowers when he'll return — they don't answer. If only she had wings.

title: 荷叶杯
author: 韦庄
content:
记得那年花下
深夜
初识谢娘时
水堂西面画帘垂
携手暗相期
惆怅晓莺残月
相别
从此隔音尘
如今俱是异乡人
相见更无因
translation:
I remember that year under the flowers
Deep night
When I first met Lady Xie
West of the water hall, painted curtains hanging
Hand in hand, secretly promising
Melancholy — dawn orioles, setting moon
Parting
Since then, separated by dust and sound
Now we're both strangers in foreign lands
Meeting again — no reason to
annotation: They met under flowers, held hands, promised forever. Then they parted. Now they're both far from home, and meeting again is impossible. The most realistic love poem: sometimes promises don't survive distance.

title: 浣溪沙
author: 韦庄
content:
清晓妆成寒食天
柳球斜袅间花钿
卷帘直出画堂前
指点牡丹初绽朵
日高犹自凭阑干
含颦不语恨春残
translation:
At dawn, makeup done, Cold Food Festival day
Willow balls slanting, dangling among flower hairpins
Rolling up the curtain, straight out before the painted hall
Pointing at the peony's first blooming bud
The sun high, still leaning on the railing
Frowning, not speaking, hating spring's end
annotation: She's dressed beautifully for the festival. But she just points at a flower and leans on the railing. 'Hating spring's end' — she's not mourning the season, she's mourning herself.

title: 谒金门
author: 韦庄
content:
空相忆
无计得传消息
天上嫦娥人不识
寄书何处觅
translation:
Vainly remembering
No way to send news
The Chang'e in heaven — no one knows her
Where to send a letter?
annotation: She wants to send a message but doesn't know where. Even the moon goddess is unreachable. When you can't reach someone, the whole universe feels too big.

title: 江城子
author: 韦庄
content:
恩重娇多情极
漏更难
解相逢
怕人知
羞郎面
整金衣
相见夜阑时
语低眉
translation:
Kindness deep, charm extreme, feelings extreme
The hour late, harder
Understanding the meeting
Afraid people will know
Ashamed before her husband
Adjusting golden clothes
Meeting when the night is late
Speaking low, brows lowered
annotation: A secret meeting late at night. She's afraid, ashamed, adjusting her clothes.韦庄 writes forbidden love with tenderness, not judgment.

title: 天仙子
author: 韦庄
content:
梦觉云屏依旧空
杜鹃声咽隔帘栊
玉郎薄幸去无踪
一日日
恨重重
泪界莲腮两线红
translation:
Waking from dreams, the cloud screen still empty
Cuckoo sounds choked behind the lattice
The jade lord, heartless, left without a trace
Day by day
Hate upon hate
Tear lines on lotus cheeks, two lines of red
annotation: She wakes to an empty room. The cuckoo cries. He's gone without a trace. Day after day, tears on her red cheeks. The most direct expression of abandonment.

title: 木兰花
author: 韦庄
content:
独上小楼春欲暮
愁望玉关芳草路
消息断
不逢人
却敛细眉归绣户
坐看落花空叹息
罗袂湿斑红泪滴
千山万水不曾行
魂梦欲教何处觅
translation:
Alone climbing the small tower, spring about to end
Sorrowfully gazing at the Jade Gate's fragrant grass road
News cut off
Not meeting anyone
She knits her fine brows and returns to the embroidery room
Sitting, watching falling flowers, sighing in vain
Silk sleeves wet with spotted red tears
A thousand mountains and ten thousand waters — she's never traveled them
Her dream soul — where can it find him?
annotation: She's never been to the frontier, but her soul searches for him there.韦庄 writes the geography of longing — distance measured in tears, not miles.

title: 小重山
author: 韦庄
content:
一闭昭阳春又春
夜寒魂梦近
黄昏庭院柳莺啼
忆君迢迢隔青天
昔时横波目
今作流泪泉
translation:
Once sealed, the sunny spring returns again and again
Night cold, dream souls near
Dusk courtyard, willow orioles sing
Remembering you, far, far away, separated by blue sky
Those once horizontal wave eyes
Now become a spring of flowing tears
annotation: Years pass in the palace. Her beautiful eyes, once like waves, now only flow with tears. The most devastating transformation: beauty into grief.

title: 酒泉子
author: 韦庄
content:
月落星沉
楼上美人春睡稳
绿云倾
金枕腻
画屏深
子规啼破相思梦
曙色东方才动
translation:
Moon sets, stars sink
Upstairs, the beauty sleeps soundly in spring
Green clouds (hair) tilted
Golden pillow, smooth
Painted screen, deep
The cuckoo breaks the longing dream
Dawn light in the east just beginning to move
annotation: She sleeps. Her hair spills across the pillow. Then a cuckoo cries and breaks her dream of him. Dawn comes. Another day without him begins.

title: 女冠子
author: 牛峤
content:
绿云高髻
点翠匀红时世
月眉娇
云鬓袅
雪肌香
绣屏掩
枕鸳钗凤
柳暗花明昼永
translation:
Green clouds (hair) in a high bun
Dotted with green, evenly red, fashionable
Moon eyebrows, charming
Cloud temples, graceful
Snow skin, fragrant
Embroidered screen hiding
Pillow with mandarin ducks, phoenix hairpin
Willow dark, flower bright, day long
annotation: A woman described from hair to skin. Everything is beautiful, fashionable, perfect. But the 'long day' hints at boredom beneath the beauty.

title: 感恩多
author: 牛峤
content:
两条红粉泪
多少香闺意
强攀桃李枝
敛愁眉
陌上莺啼蝶舞
柳花飞
柳花飞
愿得郎心
忆家还早归
translation:
Two lines of red powder tears
How much feeling in the fragrant chamber
Forcefully climbing the peach and willow branches
Knitting her brows
On the road, orioles sing, butterflies dance
Willow flowers fly
Willow flowers fly
I wish for your heart
Remember home and return early
annotation: She cries, she waits, she watches butterflies. 'Return early' — the simplest wish, the hardest to grant.

title: 望江怨
author: 牛峤
content:
东风急
惜别花时手频执
罗衣湿
红袂有啼痕
愁无限
消瘦尽
知人否
translation:
East wind urgent
Reluctant to part at flower time, hands frequently held
Silk clothes wet
Red sleeves have tear traces
Sorrow unlimited
Emaciated completely
Do you know?
annotation: They held hands, they parted, she cried. Now she's thin from missing him. 'Do you know?' — the question that every lover asks.

title: 定西番
author: 牛峤
content:
紫塞月明千里
金甲冷
戍楼寒
梦长安
思故园
思故园
两处愁
translation:
Purple frontier, moon bright, a thousand miles
Golden armor cold
Watchtower cold
Dream of Chang'an
Think of the homeland
Think of the homeland
Sorrow in two places
annotation: A soldier on the frontier. His armor is cold, the tower is cold. He dreams of home. 'Sorrow in two places' — he's sad, and so is someone back home.

title: 江城子
author: 牛峤
content:
鵁鶄飞起郡城东
碧江空
半滩风
越王宫殿
蘋叶藕花中
帘卷水楼鱼浪起
千片雪
雨蒙蒙
translation:
Herons fly up east of the prefectural city
Blue river empty
Half the beach wind
The Yue king's palace
In water lettuce leaves and lotus flowers
Curtains roll up on the water tower, fish waves rise
A thousand pieces of snow
Rain, misty and fine
annotation: Herons fly, the river is empty, the old palace is overgrown with lotus. History is just plants now.牛峤 paints the past as a watercolor.

title: 南乡子
author: 李珣
content:
乘彩舫
过莲塘
棹歌惊起睡鸳鸯
游女带香偎伴笑
争窈窕
竞折团荷遮晚照
translation:
Riding a painted boat
Crossing the lotus pond
Oar songs startle sleeping mandarin ducks
Playing girls, carrying fragrance, leaning on companions, laughing
Competing in grace
Rushing to fold round lotus leaves to shade the evening sun
annotation: Girls on a boat, laughing, competing to be the prettiest. They use lotus leaves as sunshades.李珣 captures a perfect summer afternoon.

title: 渔歌子
author: 李珣
content:
楚山青
湘水绿
春风澹荡看不足
草芊芊
花簇簇
渔艇棹歌相续
translation:
Chu mountains green
Xiang water green
Spring wind, gentle and swaying, never enough to see
Grass, lush and thick
Flowers, clustered and dense
Fishing boats, oar songs continuing
annotation: Green mountains, green water, endless spring. Fishing boats sing to each other.李珣 paints Hunan's landscape as a paradise.

title: 西溪子
author: 李珣
content:
金缕翠钿浮动
妆罢小窗圆梦
日高时
春尽也
落花中
translation:
Gold threads, green hairpins, floating and moving
After makeup, small window, fulfilling dreams
When the sun is high
Spring also ends
Among falling flowers
annotation: She puts on makeup, dreams by the window. The sun rises, spring ends, flowers fall. The whole cycle of hope and loss in five lines.

title: 河传
author: 李珣
content:
去去
何处
迢迢巴楚
山水相连
朝云暮雨
依旧暗愁无限
珠泪盈
肠断
translation:
Going, going
Where?
Far, far, Ba and Chu
Mountains and water connected
Morning clouds, evening rain
Still, dark sorrow unlimited
Pearl tears full
Heart broken
annotation: She's going far away, to the land of Ba and Chu. Morning clouds, evening rain — the classic image of separation. Her tears are pearls, her heart is broken.

title: 菩萨蛮
author: 无名氏
content:
牡丹含露真珠颗
美人折向庭前过
含笑问檀郎
花强妾貌强
檀郎故相恼
须道花枝好
一向发娇嗔
碎挼花打人
translation:
Pearl dew on peony petals
A beauty passes by the garden
Smiling, she asks her lover: are the flowers prettier or am I?
Her lover deliberately teases
And says the flower branch is better
She pouts in a tantrum
Crumples the flower and hits him
annotation: The most playful love poem. She asks the dangerous question: am I prettier than the flowers? He says the flowers. She hits him with the flowers. This is love as comedy.

title: 竹枝词
author: 孙光宪
content:
门前春水白蘋花
岸上无人小艇斜
商女经过江欲暮
散抛残食饲神鸦
translation:
Before the gate, spring water, white duckweed flowers
On the shore, no one, a small boat slanting
A merchant woman passes as the river approaches dusk
Scattering leftover food to feed the sacred crows
annotation: A quiet river scene. A boat, a woman, crows at dusk.孙光宪 finds poetry in the most ordinary moment.

title: 八拍蛮
author: 孙光宪
content:
孔雀尾拖金线长
怕人飞起入丁香
越女沙头争拾翠
相呼归去背斜阳
translation:
A peacock's tail drags, gold threads long
Afraid people will fly into the lilac
Girls on the sand vie to gather kingfisher feathers
Calling each other home, backs to the setting sun
annotation: Peacocks, gold threads, girls gathering feathers. They call each other home as the sun sets.孙光宪 paints a tropical paradise.

title: 浣溪沙
author: 孙光宪
content:
蓼岸风多橘柚香
江边一望楚天长
片帆烟际闪孤光
目送征鸿飞杳杳
思随流水去茫茫
兰红波碧忆潇湘
translation:
Reed shore, much wind, orange and pomelo fragrance
By the river, one gaze, Chu sky long
A single sail in the mist, flashing lone light
Eyes following the wild geese, flying far, far
Thoughts following the flowing water, vast, vast
Orchid red, wave blue, remembering Xiao and Xiang
annotation: Wind, citrus fragrance, a lone sail. He watches geese disappear and his thoughts follow the river. The colors — red orchids, blue waves — are the colors of memory.

title: 风流子
author: 孙光宪
content:
茅舍槿篱溪曲
鸡犬自南自北
菰叶长
水葓开
门外春波涨绿
听织
声促
轧轧鸣梭穿屋
translation:
Thatched hut, hibiscus fence, river bend
Chickens and dogs, south and north
Wild rice leaves long
Water pepper flowers open
Outside the gate, spring waves rise green
Listen to weaving
Sound urgent
Clack-clack, the shuttle pierces the house
annotation: A farm by a river. Chickens, dogs, wild rice, weaving. The shuttle's sound 'pierces the house' — you can hear the work, the life, the rhythm.

title: 谒金门
author: 孙光宪
content:
留不得
留得也应无益
白纻春衫如雪色
扬州初去日
translation:
Can't stay
Even if I stayed, it would be no use
White ramie spring jacket like snow
The day I first left Yangzhou
annotation: He can't stay. Even if he could, it wouldn't help. He remembers leaving Yangzhou in a white jacket. Some goodbyes are inevitable.

title: 思帝乡
author: 孙光宪
content:
如何
遣情情更多
永日水晶帘下
敛羞蛾
translation:
How?
Sending away feelings, feelings only increase
All day, beneath the crystal curtain
Knitting her shy brows
annotation: She tries to send away her feelings. They only multiply. All day she sits behind the curtain, frowning. The harder you try not to feel, the more you feel.

title: 清平乐
author: 孙光宪
content:
愁肠欲断
正是青春半
连理分枝鸾失伴
又是一场离散
translation:
Sorrowful intestines about to break
It's exactly mid-spring
Joined branches split, the phoenix loses its mate
Another round of separation
annotation: Mid-spring, and they're apart. The phoenix has lost its mate. 'Another round' — this isn't the first time. The repetition makes it worse.

title: 菩萨蛮
author: 孙光宪
content:
小庭花落无人扫
疏香满地东风老
春晚信沉沉
天涯何处寻
translation:
Small courtyard, flowers fall, no one sweeps
Sparse fragrance covers the ground, east wind aging
Spring evening, letters heavy
At the edge of the sky, where to search?
annotation: Flowers fall, no one sweeps. The wind is aging. No letters from far away. The courtyard is a metaphor for her heart — full of things no one tends.

title: 虞美人
author: 孙光宪
content:
红窗寂寂无人语
暗淡梨花雨
轻罗小扇掩朱唇
肠断因春
肠断因春
translation:
Red window, silent, no one to talk to
Dim, pear blossom rain
Light silk small fan covering vermilion lips
Heartbroken because of spring
Heartbroken because of spring
annotation: Silent window, rain, a fan covering her mouth. 'Heartbroken because of spring' — repeated for emphasis. Spring is supposed to be happy. Why does it hurt so much?

title: 生查子
author: 孙光宪
content:
暖日策花骢
亸鞚垂杨陌
芳草艳阳晴
忆得年时踏青
嘶骑渐远
何处认郎踪
translation:
Warm day, whip the dapple horse
Reins drooping, willow road
Fragrant grass, bright sun, clear
Remembering the year's spring outing
The neighing horse gradually far
Where to recognize his traces?
annotation: A spring day, a horse, willows. She remembers last year's outing. Now the horse is far away, and she can't find him. The road that was full is now empty.

title: 酒泉子
author: 孙光宪
content:
曲槛柳浓
窣地春衫宫样
倚阑干
倾鬓黛
脸波春
translation:
Curved railing, willow thick
Sweeping the ground, spring jacket, palace style
Leaning on the railing
Tilting temple brows
Face waves of spring
annotation: Willows, a palace-style jacket, a woman leaning on a railing. 'Face waves of spring' — her face is the season itself.

title: 河渎神
author: 孙光宪
content:
汾水碧依依
黄云落叶初飞
翠娥一去不言归
庙门空掩斜晖
translation:
Fen River, blue-green, rippling
Yellow clouds, leaves beginning to fall
The green beauty left, didn't say she'd return
The temple door, empty, closing the slanting sunlight
annotation: A river, falling leaves, a goddess who left and didn't return. The temple door closes on empty air.孙光宪 writes about absence as a physical space.

title: 后庭花
author: 孙光宪
content:
石城依旧空江国
故宫春色
七尺青螺髻
白如雪
倚阑干
translation:
Stone city, still, empty river kingdom
The old palace's spring colors
Seven-foot green snail bun
White as snow
Leaning on the railing
annotation: A ruined palace, a woman with a towering hair bun. She leans on the railing, white as snow. The kingdom fell, but she remains — beautiful and alone.

title: 思越人
author: 孙光宪
content:
古台平
芳草远
馆娃宫畔寒烟淡
露华浓
恨无穷
translation:
Ancient platform flat
Fragrant grass far
By the Guanwa Palace, cold mist thin
Dew flowers thick
Hate infinite
annotation: An old palace, distant grass, thin mist. The dew is thick, the hate is infinite.孙光宪 compresses a kingdom's fall into five lines.

title: 上行杯
author: 孙光宪
content:
离棹逡巡欲动
临极浦
故人相送
去住心情知不共
金船满捧
绮罗愁
丝管咽
回别
帆影灭
江浪如雪
translation:
The departing oar, hesitating, about to move
Facing the extreme shore
An old friend sees me off
Going and staying — our feelings are not the same
Golden boat full of gifts
Silk and gauze sorrow
Strings and pipes choke
Turning to part
Sail shadow disappears
River waves like snow
annotation: The boat hesitates. A friend waves. Music chokes. The sail disappears. Waves like snow.孙光宪 makes you feel the moment of parting.

title: 杨柳枝
author: 孙光宪
content:
有池有榭即蒙蒙
翻折旋冲陌上风
纵有雨来春更绿
拆条留取系郎踪
translation:
Where there are pools and pavilions, it's misty
Flipping, folding, spinning, rushing on the road's wind
Even if rain comes, spring is greener
Break a branch to tie his traces
annotation: Willows by a pond, misty and green. She breaks a branch to tie his traces — to keep him from leaving. The most literal love charm.

title: 渔歌子
author: 李珣
content:
荻花秋
潇湘夜
橘洲住
小艇如叶
棹入烟波明灭
translation:
Reed flowers, autumn
Xiao and Xiang, night
Orange islet dwelling
Small boat like a leaf
Oar enters the misty waves, appearing and disappearing
annotation: Autumn reeds, night on the river, a leaf-like boat. The oar enters the mist — now you see it, now you don't.李珣 paints disappearance.

title: 南乡子
author: 李珣
content:
烟漠漠
雨凄凄
岸花零落鹧鸪啼
扁舟短棹归兰浦
人去
萧萧竹径透青莎
translation:
Mist, vast and fine
Rain, bitter and cold
Shore flowers fall, partridges cry
Small boat, short oar, returning to the orchid shore
The person gone
Rustling bamboo path, penetrating green sedge
annotation: Mist, rain, falling flowers, crying birds. The boat returns, but the person is gone. Only the bamboo path remains, rustling.

title: 浣溪沙
author: 张泌
content:
独立寒阶望月华
露浓香泛小庭花
绣屏愁背一灯斜
云雨自从分散后
人间无路到仙家
但凭魂梦访天涯
translation:
Alone on cold steps, gazing at the moon's brilliance
Dew thick, fragrance drifting over small courtyard flowers
Embroidered screen, sorrow, back to a slanting lamp
Since the clouds and rain scattered
No road in the world reaches the immortal's home
Only by dream soul visiting the edge of the sky
annotation: Alone, looking at the moon. Flowers, a lamp, a screen. Since they parted, only dreams can reach him. 'Clouds and rain' — the classic Chinese metaphor for love.

title: 蝴蝶儿
author: 张泌
content:
蝴蝶儿
晚春时
阿娇初著淡黄衣
倚窗学画伊
translation:
Butterfly
Late spring
Ah Jiao first wears a pale yellow dress
Leaning on the window, learning to paint it
annotation: A girl in a yellow dress watches a butterfly and tries to paint it. The butterfly is the season, the dress is the season. Everything is spring.

title: 江城子
author: 张泌
content:
浣花溪上见卿卿
脸波明
黛眉轻
绿云高绾
金簇小蜻蜓
好是问他来得么
和笑道
莫多情
translation:
On Washing Flower River, I see you
Face waves bright
Brow light
Green clouds (hair) high-bound
Gold-clustered small dragonflies
I ask: have you come?
She laughs and says: don't be so affectionate
annotation: He sees her by the river. She laughs: 'Don't be so affectionate!' But she's smiling.张泌 captures the dance of flirtation.

title: 酒泉子
author: 张泌
content:
春雨打窗
惊梦觉来天气晓
画堂深
红焰小
背兰釭
translation:
Spring rain hits the window
Startled awake, the sky is dawn
Painted hall deep
Red flame small
Back to the orchid lamp
annotation: Rain wakes her. Dawn comes. The hall is deep, the flame is small. She turns her back to the lamp — and to the day ahead.

title: 生查子
author: 张泌
content:
相见稀
喜相见
相见还相远
檀郎故相恼
越相怜
translation:
Meetings rare
Happy to meet
Meeting, still far apart
The tan lang deliberately teases
The more I pity him
annotation: They rarely meet. When they do, they're still apart. He teases her, and she pities him more. The paradox of love: the more he pushes, the more she cares.

title: 柳枝
author: 张泌
content:
腻粉琼妆透碧纱
雪休夸
金凤镂
红蜡泪
两心花
translation:
Greasy powder, jade makeup, penetrating green silk
Don't boast of snow
Golden phoenix, carved
Red candle tears
Two hearts' flowers
annotation: Makeup, silk, candles, tears. 'Two hearts' flowers' — the only line that matters. Everything else is decoration around the central truth.

title: 南歌子
author: 张泌
content:
柳色遮楼暗
桐花落地香
画堂开处远风凉
高卷水晶帘额
衬斜阳
translation:
Willow color darkens the tower
Tulip flowers fall, fragrant
Where the painted hall opens, distant wind cool
High-rolled crystal curtain
Lining the setting sun
annotation: Willows, falling flowers, a cool wind, a crystal curtain, the setting sun.张泌 paints a perfect afternoon — beautiful and melancholy.

title: 浣溪沙
author: 张泌
content:
钿匣菱花日照临
淡妆成
泪侵寻
别离情
望断关山
translation:
Jewelry box, mirror, sunlight approaches
Light makeup done
Tears, invading
Parting feelings
Gazing until the passes and mountains end
annotation: She puts on light makeup. Tears come anyway. She looks toward the mountains where he's gone. The mirror shows her what she doesn't want to see.

title: 生查子
author: 张泌
content:
稀见客
喜还惊
强得伊
似旧情
梦初惊
恨难平
translation:
Rarely seeing a guest
Happy, still startled
Forcing to get her
Like old feelings
Dreams first startled
Hate hard to calm
annotation: A rare visit. She's happy but startled. Old feelings resurface. The dream is broken. The hate (of separation) won't calm down.

title: 酒泉子
author: 张泌
content:
花半拆
雨初晴
未卷珠帘
梦残酒醒
别离情
translation:
Flowers half-open
Rain just cleared
Pearl curtains not yet rolled
Dream broken, wine sobered
Parting feelings
annotation: Half-open flowers, clearing rain. She wakes from a dream, the wine wears off. Only the parting feelings remain. The most honest morning-after.

title: 女冠子
author: 张泌
content:
露花烟草
寂寞五云溪畔
凝恨独含情
对春莺
translation:
Dew flowers, tobacco plants
Lonely, by the Five Cloud Stream
Condensed hatred, alone containing feelings
