Facing the spring oriole
annotation: Dew, tobacco, a lonely stream. She faces a singing bird with condensed hatred. The bird doesn't care — it just sings. That's what makes it worse.

title: 江城子
author: 张泌
content:
碧阑干外小中庭
雨初晴
晓莺声
飞絮落花
时节近清明
translation:
Green railing, small central courtyard
Rain just cleared
Dawn oriole sound
Flying catkins, falling flowers
The season nears Qingming
annotation: A courtyard after rain. Orioles sing, catkins fly, flowers fall. Qingming is coming — the festival of the dead. Spring is beautiful and sad at the same time.

title: 菩萨蛮
author: 张泌
content:
玉楼冰簟鸳鸯锦
粉融香汗流山枕
帘外辘轳声
敛眉含笑惊
translation:
Jade tower, ice mat, mandarin duck brocade
Powder melting, fragrant sweat flowing on the mountain pillow
Outside the curtain, the windlass sound
Knitting brows, smiling, startled
annotation: A bedroom scene. Powder, sweat, a mandarin duck pillow. Then — a sound outside. She startles, smiles, frowns. Who is it? The poem doesn't say.

title: 浣溪沙
author: 韩偓
content:
拢鬓新收玉步摇
背灯初解绣裙腰
枕寒衾冷异香焦
深院不关春寂寂
落花和雨夜迢迢
恨情残醉倍无聊
translation:
Gathering temples, newly collected jade hairpin
Back to the lamp, first untying the embroidered skirt waist
Pillow cold, quilt cold, strange fragrance burning
Deep courtyard, not closed, spring silent
Falling flowers with rain, night long
Hate feelings, residual drunkenness, doubly bored
annotation: She undresses in the cold. The courtyard is open, rain falls, flowers fall. She's bored, drunk, lonely.韩偓 writes the anatomy of loneliness.

title: 深院
author: 韩偓
content:
鹅儿唼栀黄嘴
凤子轻盈腻粉腰
深院下帘人昼寝
红蔷薇架碧芭蕉
translation:
Goslings pecking with yellow mouths
Butterfly waists, light and greasy with powder
In the deep courtyard, curtains lowered, someone naps
Red rose trellis, green plantain
annotation: Yellow-mouthed goslings, powdery butterflies, a nap, red roses, green plantain.韩偓 paints a summer afternoon in pure color.

title: 倚醉
author: 韩偓
content:
倚醉无端寻旧约
却怜惆怅转难胜
静中楼阁深春雨
远处帘栊半夜灯
translation:
Leaning on drunkenness, for no reason seeking old promises
But pitying that melancholy is harder to bear
In stillness, towers and pavilions, deep spring rain
In the distance, curtains and lattice, midnight lamp
annotation: Drunk, he remembers old promises. The rain is deep, the lamp is distant.韩偓 writes the geography of regret.

title: 偶见
author: 韩偓
content:
秋千打困解罗裙
指点醍醐索一尊
见客入来和笑走
手搓梅子映中门
translation:
Swing tired, she unties her silk skirt
Points to fermented milk, demands a cup
Seeing a guest come in, she walks away laughing
Rubbing a plum, standing by the middle gate
annotation: She's playing on a swing, demands food, sees a guest, runs away laughing, rubbing a plum.韩偓 captures a girl's energy in four lines.

title: 寒食夜
author: 韩偓
content:
恻恻轻寒翦翦风
小梅飘雪杏花红
夜深斜搭秋千索
楼阁朦胧烟雨中
translation:
Biting, biting, light cold, cutting wind
Small plum blossoms like snow, apricot flowers red
Late at night, the swing rope slanting
Towers and pavilions, hazy in mist and rain
annotation: Cold wind, snow-like plum blossoms, red apricot flowers. A swing rope hangs empty in the rain.韩偓 paints loneliness as weather.

title: 效崔国辅体
titleEn: In the Style of Cuo Guo Fu
author: 韩偓
content:
雨后碧苔院
霜来红叶楼
闲阶上斜日
鹦鹉伴人愁
translation:
After rain, green moss courtyard
Frost comes, red tower
Idle steps, slanting sun
Parrot accompanying human sorrow
annotation: Green moss, red leaves, a slanting sun, a parrot. The parrot is the only companion.韩偓 writes loneliness with the fewest possible words.

title: 闺情
author: 韩偓
content:
轻风的的难
舞燕双双落花
深院日长人不到
满庭芳草绿纤纤
translation:
Light wind, gentle, gentle
Dancing swallows, pairs, falling flowers
Deep courtyard, day long, no one comes
Full courtyard, fragrant grass, green and delicate
annotation: Wind, swallows, falling flowers. No one comes. The grass grows green and delicate — and no one sees it.韩偓 writes neglect as a garden.

title: 想得
author: 韩偓
content:
两重门里玉堂前
寒食花枝月午天
想得那人垂粉泪
背灯愁立尽
translation:
Inside double gates, before the jade hall
Cold Food Festival, flower branches, moon at midnight
Thinking of that person, powder tears hanging
Back to the lamp, sorrowfully standing, finished
annotation: A palace, flowers, midnight. She thinks of someone crying alone.韩偓 writes about someone writing about someone — layers of loneliness.

title: 偶题
author: 韩偓
content:
俟时轻进望全功
话旧还怜计尽穷
静对绿阴清昼永
落花芳草思无穷
translation:
Waiting for the right time, hoping for complete success
Talking of the old days, pitying that all plans are exhausted
Quietly facing green shade, clear day long
Falling flowers, fragrant grass, thoughts endless
annotation: He waited for the right moment. It never came. Now he sits in the shade, watching flowers fall, thinking of everything that could have been.

title: 横塘
author: 韩偓
content:
年年耕与钓
鸥鸟已相依
棹倚春流满
帆归暮雨稀
translation:
Year after year, farming and fishing
Seagulls and I have become dependent
Oar leaning, spring stream full
Sail returning, evening rain thin
annotation: A life of farming and fishing. Seagulls as friends. A full stream, a returning sail, thin rain.韩偓 paints the ideal simple life.

title: 湖南曲
author: 韩偓
content:
湘江烟水深
沙岸隔枫林
何处鹧鸪啼
日斜斑竹阴
translation:
Xiang River, misty water deep
Sand shore, separated by maple forest
Where does the partridge cry?
Sun slanting, mottled bamboo shade
annotation: Deep river, mist, maple forest, a crying bird, mottled bamboo.韩偓 paints Hunan as a place of beauty and sadness.

title: 玉合
author: 韩偓
content:
罗囊绣两凤凰
玉合雕双鸂鶒
中有兰膏渍红豆
每回拈著长相忆
translation:
Silk pouch embroidered with two phoenixes
Jade box carved with a pair of mandarin ducks
Inside, orchid paste stains red beans
Every time I pick them up, I remember for a long time
annotation: A beautiful box with love symbols. Inside, red beans — the 'love peas' of Chinese poetry. Every time she touches them, she remembers.韩偓 writes memory as a physical object.

title: 金陵
author: 韩偓
content:
风雨萧萧
石头城下木兰桡
烟月不知人事改
夜阑还照深宫
translation:
Wind and rain, rustling
Below Stone City, a magnolia oar
Mist and moon don't know human affairs have changed
Late at night, still shining on the deep palace
annotation: Rain, a boat, the old palace. The moon doesn't know the kingdom fell. It just keeps shining.韩偓 writes history as indifference.

title: 懒起
author: 韩偓
content:
百舌唤朝眠
春心动几般
枕痕霞黯淡
泪粉玉阑干
translation:
Mynah birds call the dawn sleep
Spring feelings move in several ways
Pillow marks, rosy clouds dim
Tear powder, jade railing
annotation: Birds wake her. Spring feelings stir. Pillow marks on her face, tears on her cheeks.韩偓 writes the morning after a night of feeling too much.

title: 闻雨
author: 韩偓
content:
香侵蔽膝夜寒清
闻雨伤春梦不成
罗帐回垂红泪滴
玉钗斜簪云鬓轻
translation:
Fragrance invades the knee cover, night cold and clear
Hearing rain, grieving spring, dreams won't come
Silk curtains hang back, red tears drop
Jade hairpin slanting, cloud temples light
annotation: Rain, cold night, no dreams. Tears drop from behind the curtain.韩偓 writes rain as the sound of loneliness.

title: 新上头
author: 韩偓
content:
学梳蝉鬓试新裙
消息佳期在此春
为爱好多心转惑
遍将宜称问傍人
translation:
Learning to comb cicada temples, trying new skirts
News of a good meeting is this spring
Because of love, much, heart turns confused
Everywhere asking others: does this suit me?
annotation: A new bride learning to dress, asking everyone if she looks good. Love makes her uncertain.韩偓 captures the vulnerability of new love.

title: 中庭
author: 韩偓
content:
夜短睡迟慵早起
日高天暖梦迷离
海棠花在深深院
独坐含颦伴落花
translation:
Night short, sleeping late, lazy to rise early
Sun high, sky warm, dreams confused
Hibiscus flowers in the deep courtyard
Sitting alone, frowning, accompanying falling flowers
annotation: She wakes late, dreams in the warm sun. Hibiscus flowers fall in the deep courtyard. She sits alone with the falling flowers.韩偓 writes a whole day of loneliness.

title: 夜深
author: 韩偓
content:
恻恻轻寒翦翦风
小梅飘雪杏花红
夜深斜搭秋千索
楼阁朦胧烟雨中
translation:
Biting light cold, cutting wind
Small plum blossoms like snow, apricot flowers red
Late at night, swing rope slanting
Towers and pavilions, hazy in mist and rain
annotation: Cold wind, snow-like plum blossoms, red apricot flowers. A swing rope hangs empty in the rain.韩偓 paints loneliness as weather.

title: 偶见
author: 韩偓
content:
手挼裙带独徘徊
为忆春来
小苑花开
十二阑干遍倚
不胜愁
translation:
Rubbing her silk skirt belt, walking alone
Remembering spring's arrival
Small garden flowers bloom
Twelve railings, leaned on everywhere
Can't bear the sorrow
annotation: She walks alone, rubbing her belt, leaning on every railing. Flowers bloom, spring comes, but she's alone.韩偓 writes the body language of loneliness.

title: 自遣
author: 韩偓
content:
永日迢迢无一事
隔街闻筑气球声
谁家园里无人到
落花满地月三更
translation: A long, empty day. A strange sound from across the street. An empty garden. Flowers on the ground, the moon at midnight.
annotation: Han Wo writes boredom as a form of suffering. The longest day is the one where nothing happens.
